description: Generalized end-of-game check: a list of conditions, first match ends the game with a win or lose outcome. 1.1.0 (E7) adds — additively — a live entity-count condition ({ tag, count?, value? } via world.query(tag).length), a state truthy/falsy flag check ({ key, truthy|falsy }), and all/any composition, so a win like 'all waves complete AND zero live creeps' is data. The original { key, cmp?, value } state-threshold condition is byte-identical.

conditions.description: Array of conditions; each is a state-threshold { key, cmp?, value }, a flag { key, truthy|falsy }, an entity-count { tag, count?, value? } (value defaults 0), or a composite { all|any: [...] }, plus { outcome?, winner?, sound? } on top-level entries. Numeric thresholds are $cfg refs.
